title: Payload Verification Policy
description: Declarative policy used by generated payload verification primitives to validate managed package payload files without embedding package-specific checks in codegen.

schema_version.description: Version marker for the payload verification policy contract.

package.description: Package identifier whose managed payload is verified by this policy.

bootstrap_version.description: Expected bootstrap payload version for this package.

version_path.description: Current package payload version file path relative to the target root.

legacy_version_path.description: Legacy package payload version file path accepted for compatibility checks.

manifest_path.description: Managed payload manifest path relative to the target root.

upgrade_source.description: Upgrade-source metadata policy and field validation rules.

path.description: Current upgrade-source metadata file path relative to the target root.

legacy_path.description: Legacy upgrade-source metadata file path accepted for compatibility checks.

allowed_source_types.description: Allowed source_type values for upgrade-source metadata.

required_fields.description: Upgrade-source metadata fields that must be present.

date_fields.description: Upgrade-source metadata fields that must parse as dates, keyed by field name with an explanatory label.

additionalProperties.description: Description of the date field expectation.

integer_fields.description: Upgrade-source metadata fields that must parse as integers.

required_files.description: Managed payload files that must be present for this package.

payload_path_aliases.description: Source-to-target payload path aliases accepted when verifying installed payloads.

source.description: Payload source path represented by the alias.

target.description: Installed target path represented by the alias.

compatibility_contract_files.description: Contract files whose presence preserves compatibility with existing installed payload expectations.

current_memory.description: Current-memory path policy for required and optional memory payload files.

prefix.description: Path prefix under which current-memory files are installed.

view_files.description: Current-memory files shown by the compact current-memory view, in display order.

required.description: Current-memory files that must be present.

optional.description: Current-memory files that may be present but are not required.

forbidden_files.description: Managed payload files that must not be present.

forbidden_prefixes.description: Path prefixes that must not appear in the managed payload.

guidance_fragments.description: Expected guidance text fragments keyed by guidance file path or identifier.

additionalProperties.description: Ordered guidance fragments that must be present.

workspace_orchestrator_notice.description: Optional status action emitted when the shared workspace orchestration layer is absent.

marker.description: Marker path whose absence triggers the workspace orchestration notice.

detail.description: Human-readable status detail explaining why the orchestration notice was emitted.

role.description: Role label assigned to the orchestration notice status action.

safety.description: Safety label assigned to the orchestration notice status action.

category.description: Category label assigned to the orchestration notice status action.

status_files.description: Payload files to summarize in declarative status reports.

obsolete_files.description: Legacy payload files to report as obsolete when present.

relative_path.description: Repository-relative path that must not be absolute.
